allow: Bash(DATABASE_URL=postgresql://didvc_user:didvc_pass@localhost:5433/didvc psql $DATABASE_URL -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS organization_applications \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), org_name VARCHAR\(255\) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR\(255\) NOT NULL, org_logo_url TEXT, director_full_name VARCHAR\(255\) NOT NULL, aadhaar_number VARCHAR\(12\) NOT NULL, dob DATE NOT NULL, gender VARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL, state VARCHAR\(100\) NOT NULL, pincode VARCHAR\(10\) NOT NULL, company_name VARCHAR\(255\) NOT NULL, cin VARCHAR\(21\) NOT NULL, company_status VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL, company_category VARCHAR\(100\) NOT NULL, date_of_incorporation DATE NOT NULL, pan_number VARCHAR\(10\) NOT NULL, gstn VARCHAR\(15\) NOT NULL, ie_code VARCHAR\(10\) NOT NULL, director_name VARCHAR\(255\) NOT NULL, din VARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL, designation VARCHAR\(100\) NOT NULL, signing_authority_level VARCHAR\(100\) DEFAULT ''Single Signatory'', field_verifications JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT ''{""cin"":false,""pan"":false,""gstn"":false,""ie_code"":false}'', application_status VARCHAR\(20\) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''pending'' CHECK \(application_status IN \(''pending'',''approved'',''rejected''\)\), rejection_reason TEXT, user_id UUID REFERENCES users\(id\), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW\(\), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW\(\)\);")

Bash(sed -i '' 's|import { getPolygonService } from '\\''../blockchain/polygon.js'\\'';|import { getBesuService } from '\\''../blockchain/besu.js'\\'';|g' src/server/index.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|const polygonService = getPolygonService\(\);|const besuService = getBesuService\(\);|g' src/server/index.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|Anchor VC hash on Polygon blockchain|Anchor VC hash on Besu blockchain|g' src/server/index.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|// 5. Anchor on Polygon|// 5. Anchor on Besu|g' src/server/index.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|// ─── Polygon Endpoints|// ─── Besu Endpoints|g' src/server/index.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|// Polygon anchor \(async, non-blocking\)|// Besu anchor \(async, non-blocking\)|g' src/server/index.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/          polygon: cred\\./          besu: cred./g' src/server/index.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/        polygon: did\\./        besu: did./g' src/server/index.ts)

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('./node_modules/multer/package.json'\); console.log\('installed multer version:', m.version\);")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('multer'\); console.log\(m.version || 'no version export'\); const inst = m\({ storage: m.diskStorage\({destination: '/tmp', filename: \(r,f,cb\)=>cb\(null,f.originalname\)}\) }\); const ff = inst._fileFilter; console.log\('fileFilter type:', typeof ff\);")
Bash(node -e "const es = require\('express'\).static; const fn = es\('/tmp'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(fn\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); fs.mkdirSync\('/tmp/test-idempotent', {recursive: true}\); fs.mkdirSync\('/tmp/test-idempotent', {recursive: true}\); console.log\('double mkdirSync with recursive:true is idempotent'\);")
